title: Community Training(GA) Retirement
description: Community Training is an Azure-powered online learning platform to enable organizations of all sizes and types to run large scale training programs for their internal and external communities.
summary:
Community Training (GA) has been permanently retired and is no longer accessible.
To continue training programs, customers must migrate to a Microsoft-recognized
Community Training partner solutions mentioned below: CT Nova Technologiesoffers a product calledCT Nova, an AI-enhanced learning platform for Fortune 500 companies and nonprofit organizations.Reach out to CT Nova Technologies here to learn more about CT Nova. Philanthrosoftoffers a product calledScaleEd, a cloud-based learning platform
classification_reason: Retirement/marketing-style announcement with partner options; no technical limits, configuration details, error codes, or decision matrices that meet the expert-knowledge criteria.
